lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane real LLM-driven rework; scenarios drive the evaluator + SST-loader proofs.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: report.md '## Test Evidence': the cooling decision now flows through the relationship_cooling_evaluate scenario; TestBridgeCoolingEvaluator_* prove the LLM-driven path (parse, routing, signal forwarding, PersonID non-leak, error paths) with a scripted bridge; the SST loader tests prove fail-loud operational bounds; BUG-021-004's magic-number lock test is removed.

scenarios.title: Cooling judgment routes to the LLM scenario, parses the decision, and never leaks PersonID
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: EvaluateCooling routes IntentEnvelope{ScenarioID: relationship_cooling_evaluate}, forwards candidate signals, omits PersonID (json:"-"), parses {is_cooling,confidence,rationale}, and errors on nil runner / nil result / non-OK outcome / empty final / bad JSON.

scenarios.title: Pure helpers: typical-gap arithmetic and the operational confidence-floor gate
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: coolingTypicalGapDays = span/(n-1) (0 for <=1 interaction); coolingShouldSurface is true only when is_cooling AND confidence >= floor.

scenarios.title: Operational cooling bounds are fail-loud SST config
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Missing/empty INTELLIGENCE_RELATIONSHIP_COOLING_* keys fail loud naming the var; out-of-range values (cap<=0, floor not in [0,1], window<=0) are rejected.
